arts.ttl: Wilder Admits Sheffield United Are Struggling With Fatigue As He’s Hopeful Of Signings In Next Two Weeks
arts.sum: Sheffield United endured a frustrating start to the new year with a narrow 2-1 loss to Sunderland in a game defined by individual errors and missed opportunities. The Blades had a golden chance to take control early in the match when they were awarded a penalty inside the first 15 minutes. However, Kieffer Moore’s effort […] The post Wilder Admits Sheffield United Are Struggling With Fatigue As He’s Hopeful Of Signings In Next Two Weeks appeared first on Sheff United Way.
